title: stelis strigosa
intro: Stelis strigosa, also known as the Bearded Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its delicate and fragrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis strigosa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
